\"Option::is_none\")]\n65\t    code: Option<String>,\n66\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n67\t    link: Option<String>,\n68\t}\n69\t\n70\t/// Header name for degraded write responses.\n71\tpub const HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED: &str = \"X-Miroir-Degraded\";\n72\t\n73\t/// Quorum tracking state for write operations.\n74\t#[derive(Debug, Default)]\n75\tstruct QuorumState {\n76\t    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n77\t    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n78\t    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n79\t    group_totals: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n80\t    /// Groups that met quorum: group_id -> true\n81\t    groups_met_quorum: HashMap<u32, bool>,\n82\t    /// Total degraded groups count\n83\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n84\t}\n85\t\n86\timpl QuorumState {\n87\t    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n88\t    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n89\t        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n90\t    }\n91\t\n92\t    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n93\t    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n94\t        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n95\t    }\n96\t\n97\t    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n98\t    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n99\t        // Track that this group had a failure\n100\t        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n101\t    }\n102\t\n103\t    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n104\t    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n105\t        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n106\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n107\t        let met = acks >= quorum;\n108\t        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n109\t        met\n110\t    }\n111\t\n112\t    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n113\t    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n114\t        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n115\t    }\n116\t\n117\t    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n118\t    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n119\t        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n120\t        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n121\t            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n122\t                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n123\t                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n124\t                    degraded += 1;\n125\t                }\n126\t            }\n127\t        }\n128\t        degraded\n129\t    }\n130\t}\n131\t\n132\t/// Build router for document endpoints.\n133\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n134\twhere\n135\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n136\t{\n137\t    Router::new()\n138\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n139\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n140\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n141\t        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n142\t}\n143\t\n144\t/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\n145\tasync fn post_documents(\n146\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n147\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n148\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n149\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n150\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n151\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state).await\n152\t}\n153\t\n154\t/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\n155\tasync fn put_documents(\n156\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n157\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n158\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n159\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n160\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n161\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state).await\n162\t}\n163\t\n164\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\n165\tasync fn delete_documents(\n166\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n167\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n168\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n169\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n170\t    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n171\t    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n172\t        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n173\t            index_uid: index.clone(),\n174\t            filter: filter.clone(),\n175\t        };\n176\t        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state).await;\n177\t    }\n178\t\n179\t    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n180\t    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n181\t        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n182\t            .iter()\n183\t            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n184\t            .collect();\n185\t        if !ids.is_empty() {\n186\t            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n187\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n188\t                ids,\n189\t            };\n190\t            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state).await;\n191\t        }\n192\t    }\n193\t\n194\t    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n195\t    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n196\t        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n197\t        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n198\t    ))\n199\t}\n200\t\n201\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\n202\tasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n203\t    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n204\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n205\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n206\t    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n207\t        index_uid: index.clone(),\n208\t        ids: vec![id],\n209\t    };\n210\t    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state).await\n211\t}\n212\t\n213\t/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\n214\tasync fn write_documents_impl(\n215\t    index: String,\n216\t    primary_key: Option<String>,\n217\t    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n218\t    state: &AppState,\n219\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n220\t    if documents.is_empty() {\n221\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n222\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n223\t            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n224\t        ));\n225\t    }\n226\t\n227\t    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n228\t    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n229\t        documents\n230\t            .first()\n231\t            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n232\t    });\n233\t\n234\t    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n235\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n236\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n237\t            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n238\t        )\n239\t    })?;\n240\t\n241\t    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n242\t    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n243\t    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n244\t\n245\t    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n246\t        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n247\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n248\t        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n249\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n250\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n251\t                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n252\t            ));\n253\t        }\n254\t\n255\t        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n256\t        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n257\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n258\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n259\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n260\t            ));\n261\t        }\n262\t\n263\t        // _miroir_expires_at is NEVER reserved for writes (clients SET it per plan §13.14)\n264\t        // The merger strips it on read, but writes always accept it\n265\t\n266\t        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n267\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n268\t                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n269\t                format!(\n270\t                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n271\t                    i, primary_key\n272\t                ),\n273\t            ));\n274\t        }\n275\t    }\n276\t\n277\t    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard into each document\n278\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n279\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n280\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n281\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n282\t\n283\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n284\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n285\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n286\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n287\t        }\n288\t    }\n289\t\n290\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n291\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n292\t\n293\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n294\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n295\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n296\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n297\t    );\n298\t\n299\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n300\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n301\t\n302\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n303\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n304\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n305\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n306\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n307\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n308\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n309\t                    c.read().await\n310\t                })\n311\t            })\n312\t        });\n313\t\n314\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n315\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n316\t            shard_id,\n317\t            &topology,\n318\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n319\t        );\n320\t\n321\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n322\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n323\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n324\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n325\t            ));\n326\t        }\n327\t\n328\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n329\t\n330\t        for node_id in targets {\n331\t            let node = topology\n332\t                .node(&node_id)\n333\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n334\t\n335\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n336\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n337\t\n338\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n339\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n340\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n341\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n342\t            };\n343\t\n344\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n345\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n346\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n347\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n348\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n349\t                    }\n350\t                }\n351\t                Ok(resp) => {\n352\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n353\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n354\t                }\n355\t                Err(_) => {\n356\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n357\t                }\n358\t            }\n359\t        }\n360\t    }\n361\t\n362\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n363\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n364\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n365\t\n366\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n367\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n368\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n369\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n370\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n371\t        ));\n372\t    }\n373\t\n374\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n375\t    let miroir_task = state\n376\t        .task_registry\n377\t        .register_with_metadata(\n378\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n379\t            Some(index.clone()),\n380\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n381\t        )\n382\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n383\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n384\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n385\t        ))?;\n386\t\n387\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n388\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n389\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n390\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n391\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n392\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n393\t            error: None,\n394\t            error_type: None,\n395\t            code: None,\n396\t            link: None,\n397\t        },\n398\t        degraded_groups,\n399\t    )\n400\t}\n401\t\n402\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n403\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n404\t    index: String,\n405\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n406\t    state: &AppState,\n407\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n408\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n409\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n410\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n411\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n412\t        ));\n413\t    }\n414\t\n415\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n416\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n417\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n418\t\n419\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n420\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n421\t    for id in &req.ids {\n422\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n423\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n424\t    }\n425\t\n426\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n427\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n428\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n429\t    );\n430\t\n431\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n432\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n433\t\n434\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n435\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n436\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n437\t\n438\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n439\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n440\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n441\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n442\t            ));\n443\t        }\n444\t\n445\t        for node_id in targets {\n446\t            let node = topology\n447\t                .node(&node_id)\n448\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n449\t\n450\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n451\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n452\t\n453\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n454\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n455\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n456\t            };\n457\t\n458\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n459\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n460\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n461\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n462\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n463\t                    }\n464\t                }\n465\t                Ok(resp) => {\n466\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n467\t                }\n468\t                Err(_) => {\n469\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n470\t                }\n471\t            }\n472\t        }\n473\t    }\n474\t\n475\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n476\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n477\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n478\t\n479\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n480\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n481\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n482\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n483\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n484\t        ));\n485\t    }\n486\t\n487\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n488\t    let miroir_task = state\n489\t        .task_registry\n490\t        .register_with_metadata(\n491\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n492\t            Some(index.clone()),\n493\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n494\t        )\n495\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n496\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n497\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n498\t        ))?;\n499\t\n500\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n501\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n502\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n503\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n504\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n505\t            error: None,\n506\t            error_type: None,\n507\t            code: None,\n508\t            link: None,\n509\t        },\n510\t        degraded_groups,\n511\t    )\n512\t}\n513\t\n514\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n515\tasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n516\t    index: String,\n517\t    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n518\t    state: &AppState,\n519\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n520\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n521\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n522\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n523\t\n524\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n525\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n526\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n527\t    );\n528\t\n529\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n530\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n531\t\n532\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n533\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n534\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n535\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n536\t\n537\t        match client\n538\t            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n539\t            .await\n540\t        {\n541\t            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n542\t                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n543\t                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n544\t                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n545\t                }\n546\t            }\n547\t            Ok(resp) => {\n548\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n549\t            }\n550\t            Err(_) => {\n551\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n552\t            }\n553\t        }\n554\t    }\n555\t\n556\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n557\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n558\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n559\t\n560\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n561\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n562\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n563\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n564\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n565\t        ));\n566\t    }\n567\t\n568\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n569\t    let miroir_task = state\n570\t        .task_registry\n571\t        .register_with_metadata(\n572\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n573\t            Some(index.clone()),\n574\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n575\t        )\n576\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n577\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n578\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n579\t        ))?;\n580\t\n581\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n582\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n583\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n584\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n585\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n586\t            error: None,\n587\t            error_type: None,\n588\t            code: None,\n589\t            link: None,\n590\t        },\n591\t        degraded_groups,\n592\t    )\n593\t}\n594\t\n595\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n596\t///\n597\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n598\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n599\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n600\t        .iter()\n601\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n602\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n603\t}\n604\t\n605\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n606\t///\n607\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n608\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n609\t///\n610\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n611\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n612\t    documents: &[Value],\n613\t    primary_key: &str,\n614\t    topology: &Topology,\n615\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n616\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n617\t\n618\t    for doc in documents {\n619\t        let pk_value = doc\n620\t            .get(primary_key)\n621\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n622\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n623\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n624\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n625\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n626\t                )\n627\t            })?;\n628\t\n629\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n630\t        shard_documents\n631\t            .entry(shard_id)\n632\t            .or_default()\n633\t            .push(doc.clone());\n634\t    }\n635\t\n636\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n637\t}\n638\t\n639\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n640\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n641\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n642\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n643\t        indexUid: None,\n644\t        status: None,\n645\t        error: resp.message,\n646\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n647\t        code: resp.code,\n648\t        link: None,\n649\t    }\n650\t}\n651\t\n652\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n653\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n654\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n655\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n656\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n657\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n658\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n659\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n660\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n661\t        )\n662\t    })?;\n663\t\n664\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n665\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n666\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n667\t\n668\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n669\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n670\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n671\t    }\n672\t\n673\t    Ok(builder\n674\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n675\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n676\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n677\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n678\t        ))?)\n679\t}\n680\t\n681\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n682\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n683\t    (\n684\t        StatusCode::OK,\n685\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n686\t        Json(resp),\n687\t    )\n688\t        .into_response()\n689\t}\n690\t\n691\t#[cfg(test)]\n692\tmod tests {\n693\t    use super::*;\n694\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n695\t    use \"https://github.com/jedarden/miroir/blob/main/docs/errors.md#{}\",\n119\t            self.as_str()\n120\t        )\n121\t    }\n122\t\n123\t    /// Parse a code string back to a [`MiroirCode`].\n124\t    pub fn from_code_str(s: &str) -> Option<Self> {\n125\t        match s {\n126\t            \"miroir_primary_key_required\" => Some(Self::PrimaryKeyRequired),\n127\t            \"miroir_no_quorum\" => Some(Self::NoQuorum),\n128\t            \"miroir_shard_unavailable\" => Some(Self::ShardUnavailable),\n129\t            \"miroir_reserved_field\" => Some(Self::ReservedField),\n130\t            \"miroir_idempotency_key_reused\" => Some(Self::IdempotencyKeyReused),\n131\t            \"miroir_settings_version_stale\" => Some(Self::SettingsVersionStale),\n132\t            \"miroir_multi_alias_not_writable\" => Some(Self::MultiAliasNotWritable),\n133\t            \"miroir_jwt_invalid\" => Some(Self::JwtInvalid),\n134\t            \"miroir_jwt_scope_denied\" => Some(Self::JwtScopeDenied),\n135\t            \"miroir_invalid_auth\" => Some(Self::InvalidAuth),\n136\t            \"miroir_missing_csrf\" => Some(Self::MissingCsrf),\n137\t            \"miroir_csrf_mismatch\" => Some(Self::CsrfMismatch),\n138\t            \"miroir_index_already_exists\" => Some(Self::IndexAlreadyExists),\n139\t            \"miroir_timeout\" => Some(Self::Timeout),\n140\t            _ => None,\n141\t        }\n142\t    }\n143\t}\n144\t\n145\t/// Meilisearch-compatible error response shape.\n146\t///\n147\t/// Both Miroir-specific and forwarded Meilisearch-native errors use this shape\n148\t/// so that existing SDK error handling branches remain functional.\n149\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, thiserror::Error, Serialize)]\n150\t#[error(\"{message}\")]\n151\tpub struct MeilisearchError {\n152\t    pub message: String,\n153\t    pub code: String,\n154\t    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n155\t    pub error_type: ErrorType,\n156\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n157\t    pub link: Option<String>,\n158\t}\n159\t\n160\timpl MeilisearchError {\n161\t    /// Create a new miroir-specific error with auto-generated doc link.\n162\t    pub fn new(code: MiroirCode, message: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n163\t        Self {\n164\t            message: message.into(),\n165\t            code: code.as_str().to_string(),\n166\t            error_type: code.error_type(),\n167\t            link: Some(code.doc_link()),\n168\t        }\n169\t    }\n170\t\n171\t    /// Create from a forwarded Meilisearch node error response body.\n172\t    ///\n173\t    /// Returns `None` if the body cannot be parsed as a Meilisearch error shape.\n174\t    /// When forwarding, the caller should use the original HTTP status code from\n175\t    /// the node response rather than deriving it from the error type.\n176\t    pub fn forwarded(json: &str) -> Option<Self> {\n177\t        #[derive(serde::Deserialize)]\n178\t        struct Raw {\n179\t            message: String,\n180\t            code: String,\n181\t            #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n182\t            error_type: ErrorType,\n183\t            link: Option<String>,\n184\t        }\n185\t\n186\t        let raw: Raw = serde_json::from_str(json).ok()?;\n187\t        Some(Self {\n188\t            message: raw.message,\n189\t            code: raw.code,\n190\t            error_type: raw.error_type,\n191\t            link: raw.link,\n192\t        })\n193\t    }\n194\t\n195\t    /// Derive the HTTP status code for a miroir-generated error.\n196\t    ///\n197\t    /// For forwarded Meilisearch errors, prefer using the original node HTTP\n198\t    /// status code instead.\n199\t    pub fn http_status(&self) -> u16 {\n200\t        MiroirCode::from_code_str(&self.code)\n201\t            .map(|c| c.http_status())\n202\t            .unwrap_or_else(|| match self.error_type {\n203\t                ErrorType::InvalidRequest => 400,\n204\t                ErrorType::Auth => 401,\n205\t                ErrorType::Internal => 500,\n206\t                ErrorType::System => 503,\n207\t            })\n208\t    }\n209\t}\n210\t\n211\t#[cfg(feature = \"axum\")]\n212\timpl IntoResponse for MeilisearchError {\n213\t    fn into_response(self) -> Response {\n214\t        let status = self.http_status();\n215\t\n216\t        let body = serde_json::to_string(&self).unwrap_or_else(|_| {\n217\t            r#\"{\"message\":\"internal error\",\"code\":\"internal\",\"type\":\"internal\"}\"#.to_string()\n218\t        });\n219\t\n220\t        (\n221\t            StatusCode::from_u16(status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n222\t            [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n223\t            body,\n224\t        )\n225\t            .into_response()\n226\t    }\n227\t}\n228\t\n229\t#[cfg(test)]\n230\tmod tests {\n231\t    use super::*;\n232\t\n233\t    // -- Per-code JSON shape tests Document write path: add, replace, and delete documents.\n//!\n//! Implements P2.2 write path:\n//! - Primary key extraction on the hot path\n//! - `_miroir_shard` injection\n//! - Reserved field rejection\n//! - Two-rule quorum\n//!\n//! Implements P2.5 task reconciliation:\n//! - Collects per-node task UIDs\n//! - Registers Miroir task ID (mtask-<uuid>)\n//! - Returns mtask ID to client\n\nuse axum::extract::{Extension, Path, Query};\nuse axum::response::{IntoResponse, Response};\nuse axum::http::{StatusCode, header};\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\nuse miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\nuse miroir_core::router::{shard_for_key, write_targets_with_migration};\nuse miroir_core::scatter::{DeleteByIdsRequest, DeleteByFilterRequest, NodeClient, WriteRequest, WriteResponse};\nuse miroir_core::task::TaskRegistry;\nuse miroir_core::topology::{Topology, NodeId};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::sync::Arc;\n\nuse crate::client::HttpClient;\nuse crate::routes::admin_endpoints::AppState;\n\n/// Document write parameters from query string.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\npub struct DocumentsParams {\n    primaryKey: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Task response (Meilisearch-compatible).\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\npub struct TaskResponse {\n    taskUid: u64,\n    indexUid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response for write operations.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\npub struct DocumentsWriteResponse {\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    taskUid: Option<String>, // Changed to String to hold mtask-<uuid>\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    indexUid: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    status: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    error: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    error_type: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    code: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    link: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Header name for degraded write responses.\npub const HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED: &str = \"X-Miroir-Degraded\";\n\n/// Quorum tracking state for write operations.\n#[derive(Debug, Default)]\nstruct QuorumState {\n    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n    group_totals: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n    /// Groups that met quorum: group_id -> true\n    groups_met_quorum: HashMap<u32, bool>,\n    /// Total degraded groups count\n    degraded_groups: u32,\n}\n\nimpl QuorumState {\n    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n        // Track that this group had a failure\n        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n        let met = acks >= quorum;\n        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n        met\n    }\n\n    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n    }\n\n    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n                    degraded += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        degraded\n    }\n}\n\n/// Build router for document endpoints.\npub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\nwhere\n    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n{\n    Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\nasync fn post_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state).await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\nasync fn put_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n            index_uid: index.clone(),\n            filter: filter.clone(),\n        };\n        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state).await;\n    }\n\n    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n            .iter()\n            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n            .collect();\n        if !ids.is_empty() {\n            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n                index_uid: index.clone(),\n                ids,\n            };\n            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state).await;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n    ))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\nasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n        index_uid: index.clone(),\n        ids: vec![id],\n    };\n    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state).await\n}\n\n/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\nasync fn write_documents_impl(\n    index: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n    state: &AppState,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    if documents.is_empty() {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n        documents\n            .first()\n            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n    });\n\n    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n        MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n        )\n    })?;\n\n    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n\n    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // _miroir_expires_at is NEVER reserved for writes (clients SET it per plan §13.14)\n        // The merger strips it on read, but writes always accept it\n\n        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n                format!(\n                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n                    i, primary_key\n                ),\n            ));\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard into each document\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    for doc in &mut documents {\n        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n\n    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n                    c.read().await\n                })\n            })\n        });\n\n        // Use migration-aware routing\n        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n            shard_id,\n            &topology,\n            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n        );\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n\n        for node_id in targets {\n            let node = topology\n                .node(&node_id)\n                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n\n            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n\n            let req = WriteRequest {\n                index_uid: index.clone(),\n                documents: docs.clone(),\n                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n            };\n\n            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                    }\n                }\n                Ok(resp) => {\n                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\nasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n    index: String,\n    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    state: &AppState,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n    for id in &req.ids {\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n    }\n\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        for node_id in targets {\n            let node = topology\n                .node(&node_id)\n                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n\n            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n\n            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n                index_uid: index.clone(),\n                ids: ids.clone(),\n            };\n\n            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                    }\n                }\n                Ok(resp) => {\n                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\nasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n    index: String,\n    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    state: &AppState,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n\n        match client\n            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                }\n            }\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n///\n/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\nfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n        .iter()\n        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n}\n\n/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n///\n/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n///\n/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\nfn group_documents_by_shard(\n    documents: &[Value],\n    primary_key: &str,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for doc in documents {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key)\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                MeilisearchError::new(\n                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n                )\n            })?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n        shard_documents\n            .entry(shard_id)\n            .or_default()\n            .push(doc.clone());\n    }\n\n    Ok(shard_documents)\n}\n\n/// Build an error response from a node error.\nfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n        indexUid: None,\n        status: None,\n        error: resp.message,\n        error_type: resp.error_type,\n        code: resp.code,\n        link: None,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\nfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n    degraded_groups: u32,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n        MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n        )\n    })?;\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n\n    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder\n        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n        ))?)\n}\n\n/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\nfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n    (\n        StatusCode::OK,\n        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n        Json(resp),\n    )\n        .into_response()\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n    use serde_json::json;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() {\n        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"name\": regardless of config\n        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n        assert_eq!(err.error_type, miroir_core::api_error::ErrorType::InvalidRequest);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_updated_at_when_anti_entropy_enabled() {\n        // When
